## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Logic and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch data issue resolved; future metrics should be more accurate](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [First blog post indexed by Google, showing promising early performance](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [5 new blog posts in progress; 8-10 more in high-priority backlog](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [New keyword research underway to align with content priorities](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Logic's big relaunch postponed to Monday, Oct 20th; may delay content feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Scrunch Data Cleanup

  - [Issue: Scrunch was incorrectly labeling prompts containing "logic" as mentions](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Solution: Removed lowercase "logic" from alternative names in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Azzam's perspective: Focus on trajectory rather than absolute numbers](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Baseline adjusted to \~10 instead of zero for more accurate progress tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### Blog Performance Metrics

  - [4 blogs published total; 3 went live yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Looker dashboard updated with new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [First blog (e-commerce content moderation) indexed without manual submission](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Ranking positions:](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - ["E-commerce automated content moderation": 1.9](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - ["E-commerce content moderation": 9 (still on page 1)](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [ChatGPT content pickup timeline: estimated 2-3 months based on past experience](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Content Pipeline Update

  - [5 blog posts currently in progress](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [3 articles delivered for review (via email)](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [2 more articles coming in next 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [8-10 high-priority articles in backlog](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### SEO Strategy Refinement

  - [New keyword research focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
    1.  Intelligence focus with existing customer validation
    2.  Alternatives for non-technical teams
    3.  Category-redefining content
  - [Goal: Identify gaps and new angles for current keywords](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Upcoming: 20-30 new article ideas based on research](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Feedback and Communication

  - [Team appreciates Logic's thoughtful and helpful feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Content manager (Kavishka) using feedback to improve post-processing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Logic team offered additional context (demo, slide deck) if needed](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Preference for content updates via Slack instead of email](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Logic Relaunch Update

  - [Originally scheduled for today, postponed to Monday, October 20th](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [May cause slight delay in content feedback over next few days](https://fathom.video/share/qb1TfRs9MwgNxyeS-xD2M4gX-ciuphsR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
